name: Order to Invoice
description: Automatically generates an invoice when an order is created and sends a confirmation email with the invoice attached.

config.promptTemplate: Generate an invoice for order {{payload.orderId}}. Customer: {{payload.customerId}}. Total: {{payload.total}} {{payload.currency}}. Include all line items and set payment terms to 30 days.

config.subject: Your order {{payload.orderId}} has been confirmed
config.bodyTemplate:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for your order ({{payload.orderId}}).

Your invoice has been generated. Total due: {{payload.total}} {{payload.currency}}.

Payment is due within 30 days.

Thank you for your business.
